name: Global X Uranium ETF
description: The Global X Uranium ETF (URA) provides investors access to a broad range of companies involved in uranium mining and the production of nuclear components, including those in extraction, refining, exploration, or manufacturing of equipment for the uranium and nuclear industries. As nuclear power gains recognition as a reliable, low-carbon energy source essential for global decarbonization efforts, URA offers targeted exposure to the growth of the nuclear energy sector. The fund tracks the Solactive Global Uranium & Nuclear Components Index, offering a liquid and diversified vehicle for investing in the uranium cycle.
